title: cistus albidus f. albus
intro: Cistus albidus f. albus, also known as White Rock Rose or White Cistus, is a flowering plant species in the family Cistaceae. It is a low-growing, woody shrub that is native to the Mediterranean region, prized for its white flowers and medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat a variety of health issues, including wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. Cistus albidus f. albus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile and sought-after natural remedy.
